positive: A minimalist, stylized woodland creature scene. Central subject is a whimsical fox silhouette surrounded by abstract, stylized forest elements: stylized ferns, crescent moons, and celestial constellations rendered in deep indigo and burnt sienna. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, suitable for a single-color screen print design. The style is modern bohemian folk art, utilizing clean lines and strong, contrasting negative space. Graphic design, vector art quality, high contrast, flat color blocks, suitable for apparel print, golden ratio composition.
